label: Telemetry
description: System telemetry and stats options including GPU and network bandwidth monitoring.

network_interfaces.label: Network interfaces
network_interfaces.description: List of network interface name prefixes to monitor for bandwidth statistics.

stats.label: System stats
stats.description: Options to enable/disable collection of various system and GPU statistics.

amd_gpu_stats.label: AMD GPU stats
amd_gpu_stats.description: Enable collection of AMD GPU statistics if an AMD GPU is present.

intel_gpu_stats.label: Intel GPU stats
intel_gpu_stats.description: Enable collection of Intel GPU statistics if an Intel GPU is present.

network_bandwidth.label: Network bandwidth
network_bandwidth.description: Enable per-process network bandwidth monitoring for camera ffmpeg processes and detectors (requires capabilities).

intel_gpu_device.label: SR-IOV device
intel_gpu_device.description: Device identifier used when treating Intel GPUs as SR-IOV to fix GPU stats.

version_check.label: Version check
version_check.description: Enable an outbound check to detect if a newer Frigate version is available.
